Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to be persisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: needsAdditional
Variable.Description: Flag for determining if additional steps are needed before Leaver Event.

Variable.name: hasEnabledLink
Variable.Description: Flag for determining if Identity has enabled application links

Variable.name: duoLinks
Variable.Description: List of any Duo links associated with the Identity

Variable.name: azureLinks
Variable.Description: Get the Azure Links associated with the Identity

Step.name: MDM Validation

Arg.name: workItemDescription
Arg.value: Status mismatch in MDM Wipe for $(identityName).

Step.Description: PeopleSoft status and AD status mismatch for user ($(identityName)). Thorough investigation required on this issue.

Step.name: Type Check
Step.Description: Conditionally determines if additional steps are needed prior to subprocessing into AP Leaver Workflow

Step.name: AD Status Check
Step.Description: Loops over AD Links to determine if any are currently enabled.

Arg.name: workItemDescription
Arg.value: Leaving Physician has Active AD Links - Manual Review Required (i.e. Should Leaver Event Proceed?)
